case.title: DONOHOE v. EL PASO & S. W. R. CO.

opinion.h4: DONOHOE v. EL PASO & S. W. R. CO., (1909)
opinion.p: MICHAEL DONOHOE, Appellant, v. EL PASO & SOUTHWESTERN RAILROAD COMPANY. No. 516.
Mr. Charles F. Ainsworth for appellant.
Messrs. A. B. Browne, Alexander Britton, and E. E. Ellenwood for appellee.
Judgment affirmed. Roberts v. Northern P. R. Co. 158 U.S. 1, 39 L. Ed. 873, 15 Sup. Ct. Rep. 756; Northern P. R. Co. v. Smith, 171 U.S. 260, 43 L. Ed. 157, 18 Sup. Ct. Rep. 794.
